root_text.an9.93:1.3: Asubhasaññā, maraṇasaññā, āhāre paṭikūlasaññā, sabbaloke anabhiratasaññā, aniccasaññā, anicce dukkhasaññā, dukkhe anattasaññā, pahānasaññā, virāgasaññā—
root_text.an9.93:1.4: rāgassa, bhikkhave, abhiññāya ime nava dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an9.93:1.1: “For insight into greed, nine things should be developed.
translation_text.an9.93:1.3: The perceptions of ugliness, death, repulsiveness of food, dissatisfaction with the whole world, impermanence, suffering in impermanence, not-self in suffering, giving up, and fading away.
translation_text.an9.93:1.4: For insight into greed, these nine things should be developed.”
